    • Analysing bathymetric data in R with marmap

Convert bathymetric data to a raster layer

Source: R/mar_as_raster.R
mar_as_raster.Rd

Transforms an object of class bathy to a raster layer.

Usage

mar_as_raster(bathy)

as.raster(bathy)

Arguments

bathy

an object of class bathy

Value

An object of class RasterLayer with the same characteristics as the bathy object (same longitudinal and latitudinal ranges, same resolution).

Details

mar_as_raster transforms bathy objects into objects of class RasterLayer as defined in the raster package. All methods from the raster package are thus available for bathymetric data (e.g. rotations, projections...).

See also

mar_as_xyz, mar_as_bathy, mar_as_spatial_grid_data_frame

Author

Benoit Simon-Bouhet

Examples

# load Hawaii bathymetric data
data(hawaii)

# use mar_as_raster
r.hawaii <- mar_as_raster(hawaii)

# class "RasterLayer"
class(r.hawaii)

# Summaries
summary(hawaii)
summary(r.hawaii)

# structure of the RasterLayer object
str(r.hawaii)

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
# Plots
#require(raster)
plot(hawaii,image=TRUE,lwd=.2)
plot(r.hawaii)
} # }
